records.summary_analyst: CVE-2025-49113 affects Roundcube Webmail by allowing attackers to exploit improper input validation in the file upload feature, potentially leading to arbitrary file upload and execution of malicious code on the server.
records.summary_ciso: The vulnerability CVE-2025-49113 in Roundcube Webmail exposes our organization to potential data breaches and unauthorized access, necessitating immediate mitigation to protect sensitive communications and maintain customer trust.
records.description: CVE-2025-49113 affects Roundcube Webmail by allowing attackers to exploit improper input validation in the file upload feature, potentially leading to arbitrary file upload and execution of malicious code on the server.

news_article.title: U.S. CISA adds RoundCube Webmail flaws to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog

records.summary_analyst: CVE-2026-1731 is a vulnerability in Beyondtrust Privileged Remote Access that allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary commands on the affected system via specially crafted HTTP requests.
records.summary_ciso: CVE-2026-1731 presents a critical vulnerability in Beyondtrust Privileged Remote Access that could allow unauthorized access to sensitive systems, exposing the organization to significant data breaches and necessitating immediate remediation to protect our assets.
records.description: CVE-2026-1731 is a vulnerability in Beyondtrust Privileged Remote Access that allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute arbitrary commands on the affected system via specially crafted HTTP requests.

news_article.title: Hackers probe, exploit newly patched BeyondTrust RCE flaw (CVE-2026-1731)

records.summary_analyst: CVE-2026-22769 is a vulnerability in Dell RecoverPoint for Virtual Machines that allows an unauthenticated attacker to perform remote code execution by exploiting improperly validated input in the management console.
records.summary_ciso: CVE-2026-22769 poses an immediate risk to Dell RecoverPoint for Virtual Machines, potentially exposing sensitive data to unauthorized access, which could disrupt operations and compromise compliance if not addressed swiftly.
records.description: CVE-2026-22769 is a vulnerability in Dell RecoverPoint for Virtual Machines that allows an unauthenticated attacker to perform remote code execution by exploiting improperly validated input in the management console.

news_article.title: China-linked snoops have been exploiting Dell 0-day since mid-2024, using 'ghost NICs' to avoid detection

records.summary_analyst: CVE-2026-20127 is a vulnerability in the Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager that allows an unauthenticated, remote attacker to execute arbitrary commands on the underlying operating system via crafted HTTP requests.
records.summary_ciso: CVE-2026-20127 exposes the Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager to potential unauthorized access, putting critical network resources at risk and demanding immediate attention to mitigate severe operational disruptions and data breaches.
records.description: CVE-2026-20127 is a vulnerability in the Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager that allows an unauthenticated, remote attacker to execute arbitrary commands on the underlying operating system via crafted HTTP requests.

news_article.title: Cisco SD-WAN Zero-Day CVE-2026-20127 Exploited Since 2023 for Admin Access

records.summary_analyst: CVE-2026-25108 allows attackers to exploit a vulnerability in Soliton Filezen's file handling mechanism, potentially leading to remote code execution through crafted files.
records.summary_ciso: CVE-2026-25108 presents an urgent risk for Soliton Filezen that could lead to data breaches and operational disruptions, necessitating immediate mitigation to protect sensitive information and maintain business integrity.
records.description: CVE-2026-25108 allows attackers to exploit a vulnerability in Soliton Filezen's file handling mechanism, potentially leading to remote code execution through crafted files.

news_article.title: CISA Confirms Active Exploitation of FileZen CVE-2026-25108 Vulnerability

records.summary_analyst: CVE-2026-2441 is a vulnerability in Google Chrome that allows for potential arbitrary code execution through a race condition in the browser's file handling component.
records.summary_ciso: CVE-2026-2441 exposes Google Chrome to significant security vulnerabilities that could lead to data breaches, highlighting an urgent need for immediate updates to protect sensitive information and maintain business continuity.
records.description: CVE-2026-2441 is a vulnerability in Google Chrome that allows for potential arbitrary code execution through a race condition in the browser's file handling component.

records.summary_analyst: CVE-2023-43000 is a vulnerability in Apple Safari that allows attackers to exploit a use-after-free condition in the WebKit component, potentially leading to arbitrary code execution.
records.summary_ciso: CVE-2023-43000 poses an urgent risk for organizations using Apple Safari due to a vulnerability that could allow attackers to execute arbitrary code, potentially leading to data breaches and significant business disruptions if not mitigated promptly.
records.description: CVE-2023-43000 is a vulnerability in Apple Safari that allows attackers to exploit a use-after-free condition in the WebKit component, potentially leading to arbitrary code execution.

records.summary_analyst: CVE-2026-22719 is a vulnerability in VMware Aria Operations that allows an attacker to exploit improper input validation in the API, potentially leading to remote code execution on the affected component.

records.summary_ciso: CVE-2024-7694 poses a significant risk to business operations by enabling potential unauthorized access to critical data systems through vulnerabilities in Teamt5 Threatsonar Anti-ransomware, necessitating immediate mitigation to safeguard against ransomware attacks and protect sensitive information.
